description: Crawl https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider to discover and analyze all paginated URLs. Export the internal HTML page data to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Create a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/pagination_report.txt containing the total number of internal URLs found, the total number of paginated URLs (those with '/page-' in the path), the maximum depth of pagination observed, and a recommendation on whether these pages should be indexed.
